name: Huizhou China Eagle Electronic Technology Inc.
summary: Huizhou China Eagle Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells printed circuit boards in China and internationally. The company's products include offers rigid and flexible circuit, multilayer, HDI, and aluminum substrate boards. Its products are used in consumer electronics, network communications, automotive electronics, security, LED displays, medical equipment, AI, IOT, AR/VR, and drones, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Huizhou, China.
